title: iodes vitiginea var. vitiginea
intro: Iodes vitiginea var. vitiginea, also known as Chinese Iodine or Vitex Iodine, is a plant species belonging to the family Icacinaceae, native to Southeast Asia and China, and is highly valued for its medicinal properties. The plant contains high levels of iodine, which has been traditionally used to treat goiter, thyroid disorders, and iodine deficiency, making it a rich source of this essential mineral. The health benefits of Iodes vitiginea var. vitiginea include improved thyroid function, enhanced immune system, and support for healthy metabolism, among others. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
